title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Exide Industries Digital Technologies:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries Digital Technologies!
